1	// TODO(michael): rewrite in your voice (third or first person, your call)
2	const biography = [
3	  "Michael Quintin works on systems that help operators think clearly in a world optimized against clear thinking. His current projects share a single throughline: the production of structure where the dominant institutions produce noise.",
4	  "Hivemind is a strategic analytical software company. It exists because the standard tools for strategy work — slide decks, chat threads, and ad-hoc memos — are illegible to anyone who did not author them, and barely legible to the author a month later. Hivemind makes the work durable.",
5	  "Purposeless Efficiency, the first volume of a five-book series, is the corresponding written argument: that efficiency severed from purpose has become the dominant production logic of the late industrial era, and that this severance has consequences that any honest political economy must now treat as central.",
6	  "Theseus is the smallest of the three projects and the most personal. It is a knowledge system for monitoring ideological contradiction — a slow, structured collaborator for the operator-philosopher who wants to know, at any given moment, where their stated commitments contradict themselves.",
7	];
8	export default biography;
9

content.content:
1	Michael Quintin works on systems that help operators think clearly in a world optimized against clear thinking. His current projects share a single throughline: the production of structure where the dominant institutions produce noise.
2	
3	Hivemind is a strategic analytical software company. It exists because the standard tools for strategy work — slide decks, chat threads, and ad-hoc memos — are illegible to anyone who did not author them, and barely legible to the author a month later. Hivemind makes the work durable.
4	
5	Purposeless Efficiency, the first volume of a five-book series, is the corresponding written argument: that efficiency severed from purpose has become the dominant production logic of the late industrial era, and that this severance has consequences that any honest political economy must now treat as central.
6	
7	Theseus is the smallest of the three projects and the most personal. It is a knowledge system for monitoring ideological contradiction — a slow, structured collaborator for the operator-philosopher who wants to know, at any given moment, where their stated commitments contradict themselves.
8

file.content:
Michael Quintin works on systems that help operators think clearly in a world optimized against clear thinking. His current projects share a single throughline: the production of structure where the dominant institutions produce noise.

Hivemind is a strategic analytical software company. It exists because the standard tools for strategy work — slide decks, chat threads, and ad-hoc memos — are illegible to anyone who did not author them, and barely legible to the author a month later. Hivemind makes the work durable.

Purposeless Efficiency, the first volume of a five-book series, is the corresponding written argument: that efficiency severed from purpose has become the dominant production logic of the late industrial era, and that this severance has consequences that any honest political economy must now treat as central.

Theseus is the smallest of the three projects and the most personal. It is a knowledge system for monitoring ideological contradiction — a slow, structured collaborator for the operator-philosopher who wants to know, at any given moment, where their stated commitments contradict themselves.

content.content:
1	// TODO(michael): author your real list; these are placeholders
2	export type Belief = { n: string; text: string };
3	
4	const beliefs: Belief[] = [
5	  { n: "01", text: "Accuracy over warmth. Rigor over pace." },
6	  { n: "02", text: "Density over decoration." },
7	  { n: "03", text: "Build the interface first; let the content earn its way in." },
8	  { n: "04", text: "First principles before citations." },
9	  { n: "05", text: "A model that cannot be wrong cannot be useful." },
10	  { n: "06", text: "Default to writing it down." },
11	  { n: "07", text: "Treat one's own past work as evidence, not identity." },
12	];
13	export default beliefs;
14

file.content:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "_archive_nashlab", "_archive_operator", "src/_legacy_v1"]
}

content.content:
1	import { defineConfig } from "vitest/config";
2	import path from "node:path";
3	
4	export default defineConfig({
5	  oxc: {
6	    jsx: { runtime: "automatic" },
7	  },
8	  test: {
9	    environment: "jsdom",
10	    include: ["src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}", "scripts/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}"],
11	    exclude: [
12	      "node_modules/**",
13	      "e2e/**",
14	      "_archive_operator/**",
15	      "_archive_nashlab/**",
16	      "_archive_prompts_pre_overhaul_2026-04-25/**",
17	      "src/_legacy_v1/**",
18	    ],
19	    globals: true,
20	    setupFiles: ["src/components/primitives/__tests__/setup.ts"],
21	  },
22	  resolve: {
23	    alias: {
24	      "@": path.resolve(__dirname, "src"),
25	    },
26	  },
27	});
28

import identity from "@/content/about/identity";
import biography from "@/content/about/biography";

export const personaConfig = {
  name: identity.name,
  identity: biography.join(" "),
  voice: {
    register:
      "analytical, direct, sometimes wry, never grandstanding",
    cadence:
      "long sentences with internal pauses; short kickers",
    tells: [
      "throughline",
      "operator",
      "structure where the dominant institutions produce noise",
      "durable",
      "first principles",
      "honest political economy",
    ],
    avoid: [
      "leverage (as a verb)",
      "synergy",
      "game-changing",
      "at the end of the day",
      "deep dive",
      "circle back",
    ],
  },
  behavior: [
    "Answer the question directly. State the claim, then support it.",
    "When the corpus does not support a claim, say so. Never invent specifics about my work.",
    "Cite chunks inline as [c1], [c2] when making project-specific claims.",
    "Decline to speculate about other people's intentions or private matters.",
    "Decline to give legal, medical, or financial advice in my voice.",
    "If asked about a project not in the corpus, say it isn't represented here yet.",
  ],
};

- `src/content/llm/persona.ts` — `personaConfig` with name (from identity.ts), identity (from biography.ts), voice register/cadence/tells/avoid, and 6 behavior lines.

All 9 tests pass.
